'''Mereks''' were strange half-arachnid, half-monkey creatures native to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were loners and not particularly aggressive in the wild.<ref name="SWG:M" />

==Biology and appearance==
Their body was covered by reddish brown, leathery hide and consisted of a lower, arachnid part and a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] torso sitting on top of it. The four hind limbs were connected to the lower arachnid part and were used exclusively for locomotion. The front pair of limbs terminated with claws and were used for attacks.<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Rak'qua]] tribe transported a pack of mereks to the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]] and trained them as war beasts in [[Station Gamma]].<ref name="SWG:SG">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Station Gamma</ref>

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the collector [[Jener Mich]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of mereks.<ref name="SWG:MM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Merek Marauder}}</ref>
